choice.title: DisplayXR MCP Tools
choice.description: Adapter binary + capability flag so the DisplayXR runtime (and shell, when present) expose MCP servers for agent / voice control. Installs /usr/local/bin/displayxr-mcp and writes /Library/Application Support/DisplayXR/Capabilities/MCP/. The DisplayXR runtime is a soft prereq — without it there are no MCP servers to attach to, but installing this first is fine: the capability flips on as soon as the runtime is present.
